title: Honeymoon in Bali
writer: Grace Sartwell Mason, Katharine Brush, Virginia Van Upp
actors: Fred MacMurray, Madeleine Carroll, Allan Jones
plot: Bill Burnett, a resident of Bali, visits New York City, meets and falls in love with Gail Allen, the successful manager of a Fifth Avenue department store, who is determined to remain free and independent. Bill proposes, Gail decl...
